rulings.Case Title: FABIAN CARCALLAS et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Eaton Electrical, Inc. To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition, And To Produce Documents At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, January 21, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. PLAINTIFFS ESTELA CARCALLAS, FABIAN CARCALLAS, OLIVER CARCALLAS' motion to compel defendant Eaton Electrical, Inc. to produce its custodian of records and person(s) most knowledgeable for deposition, and to produce documents at deposition is granted. Eaton is required to produce a witness for deposition. A declaration, interrogatory responses and/or prior deposition testimony is insufficient. If Eaton selects Mr. Bonness, then Mr. Bonness may be in Milwaukee at the time of his deposition and plaintiff and other parties may participate by telephone, videoconferencing or other means. If Eaton selects someone other than Mr. Bonness, the parties are ordered to meet and confer about the location of the deposition. The parties are required to meet and confer about the subject areas of the deposition to limit the deposition to those areas that are relevant and likely to lead to relevant evidence in this case. =(220/HEK)
